name: Authenticated organisation profile slice
summary: First vertical slice: React protected route (organisation.read) ? useSession ? TanStack Query ? contract client ? platform-api permission guard ? use case (DI, no pg) ? repository port ? Postgres adapter ? structured logs/traces. Hardened to canonical hexagonal architecture via ADR-ACT-0118.
shortcutsFixed: usecases/organisation.ts imported pg directly ? removed, DI via OrganisationRepository port
Routes duplicated in tests ? server/routes.ts exported and shared by http.ts and tests
no-permissions fixture had organisationId ? replaced with no-membership (empty tenantId/organisationId)
Operation name was raw path string ? explicit operationName field on Route
No domain validation for displayName ? normaliseOrganisationDisplayName() trims, validates length/chars
finalAuditHardening: Use case held module-level createLogger/createTracer globals ? removed; use case is now purely repo orchestration + business validation. Logging/tracing owned by the pipeline layer.

Both handlers duplicated POSTGRES_URL + PostgresOrganisationRepository wiring ? added apps/platform-api/src/server/dependencies.ts as a minimal composition root (getPostgresUrl, getOrganisationRepository, createOrganisationDependencies).
Adapter opened a fresh pg.Client per method call ? adapter now owns a shared pg.Pool (max=10) constructed once per process.
apps/platform-api/src/server/health.ts contained raw SELECT 1 ? extracted to adapters/postgres-readiness-adapter.ts (PostgresReadinessAdapter.ping); server/ now contains zero raw SQL.

contracts-organisation UpdateOrganisationProfileRequestSchema bounds (min 1 / max 100) disagreed with domain rules (min 2 / max 120) ? aligned to min 2 / max 120 and made .strict() so unknown fields (slug, id, tenantId) are rejected at the contract boundary with 400 instead of being silently dropped.

noMembershipFixture.tenantId: empty string (test-only, not production identity semantics)
noMembershipFixture.organisationId: empty string (test-only, not production identity semantics)
noMembershipFixture.rationale: SessionActorSchema uses z.string() (no min(1)); empty strings are schema-valid and signal absent membership context. Pipeline 403 fires before RuntimeContext reads these fields.

e2eIdempotency.tenantAdminUpdateTest: Restores fixture display name ('Fixture Organisation') within the same test. No teardown required.
e2eIdempotency.viewerTest: Mocks /api/session at browser level ? no Postgres mutation, order-independent.
e2eIdempotency.noMembershipTest: Mocks /api/session at browser level ? no Postgres mutation, order-independent.
e2eIdempotency.unauthenticatedTest: Mocks /api/session at browser level ? no Postgres mutation, order-independent.
e2eIdempotency.result: Repeated test:e2e runs produce identical results.

constraints: React app does not import pg, platform-api, or server-side packages
Fixture session used ? no real Keycloak (ADR-ACT-0110 remains Open)
Use case has zero pg imports ? all SQL owned by PostgresOrganisationRepository adapter
Use case has zero module-level globals ? logger/tracer not constructed inside usecases/organisation.ts
server/ contains zero raw SQL ? readiness probe owned by PostgresReadinessAdapter
Contract bounds and domain validation rules are intentionally identical (min 2 / max 120)
Update request schema is .strict() ? slug/id/tenantId in body are rejected with 400
no-membership fixture uses empty strings for test-only semantics; documented as not production identity
acceptanceCriteriaPassed: Use case purity confirmed (no pg, no SQL, no env reads, no getFixtureSession, DI, owns validation)
Composition root centralises wiring without framework complexity
/e2e-harness clearly test-only, not in product navigation
Frontend: ProtectedRoute, TanStack Query, cache invalidation, forbidden state
E2E idempotency: fixture data restored in-test
Real Keycloak login remains blocked until ADR-ACT-0110
